content.text: The system shall allow the user to navigate to the Productivity Analytics screen through the navigation path: MHE → MEPS → Productivity Analytics.
navigate to the Productivity Analytics screen
the user is in the MHE module
the user navigates through MHE → MEPS → Productivity Analytics
the system shall open the Productivity Analytics screen.
The system shall display the page title “Productivity Analytics” at the top of the screen.
The system shall display navigation tabs including Task Productivity, Asset Productivity, Environment Productivity, and Trends & Insights.
the system shall display Task Productivity, Asset Productivity, Environment Productivity, and Trends & Insights tabs.
The system shall allow the user to switch between the available Productivity Analytics tabs.
the system shall display selected tab content.
The system shall highlight the active tab visually when selected.
the system shall highlight the active tab visually.
The system shall display Asset Productivity tab content when the user selects the Asset Productivity tab.
the user selects Asset Productivity tab
the system shall display Asset Productivity content.
The system shall display a metric card labelled “Top Operator Productivity Score.”
the Asset Productivity tab is displayed
the system shall display “Top Operator Productivity Score”.
The system shall display the name of the operator with the highest productivity score within the selected timeframe.
the system shall display the operator with highest score.
The system shall display a metric card labelled “Lowest Operator Productivity Score.”
the Asset Productivity tab is displayed
the system shall display “Lowest Operator Productivity Score”.
The system shall display the name of the operator with the lowest productivity score within the selected timeframe.
the system shall display the operator with lowest score.
The system shall display a metric card labelled “Top MHE Productivity Score.”
the Asset Productivity tab is displayed
the system shall display “Top MHE Productivity Score”.
The system shall display the identifier of the MHE equipment with the highest productivity score within the selected timeframe.
the system shall display MHE with highest score.
The system shall display a metric card labelled “Lowest MHE Productivity Score.”
the Asset Productivity tab is displayed
the system shall display “Lowest MHE Productivity Score”.
The system shall display the identifier of the MHE equipment with the lowest productivity score within the selected timeframe.
the system shall display MHE with lowest score.
The system shall display a chart titled “Operator Productivity Leaderboard – Top 05.”
the system shall display “Operator Productivity Leaderboard – Top 05”.
The system shall display a subtitle “Ranked by Score” below the chart title.
the system shall display “Ranked by Score”.
The system shall display a horizontal bar chart visualization representing operator productivity scores.
the system shall display a horizontal bar chart of operator productivity scores.
The system shall display the top five operators ranked based on productivity score.
see top five operators based on productivity
the system shall show top five operators ranked by productivity score.
The system shall display operator names along the Y-axis of the chart.
see operator names on the chart
the system shall display operator names.
The system shall display Productivity Score values along the X-axis.
the system shall display productivity score values.
The system shall label the X-axis as “Productivity Score.”
the system shall label it as “Productivity Score”.
The system shall scale the Productivity Score axis from 0 to 100 or the maximum score range available.
the system shall scale it from 0 to 100 or max available score.
The system shall represent each operator’s productivity score using a horizontal bar whose length corresponds to the score value.
the system shall display horizontal bars proportional to score values.
The system shall display a refresh icon within the chart panel.
the system shall display refresh icon.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the leaderboard data by clicking the refresh icon.
the system shall reload leaderboard data.
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over or selects a bar representing an operator.
the user hovers over a bar
the system shall display a tooltip.
The system shall display the Operator name within the tooltip.
the system shall show operator name.
The system shall display the Operator ID associated with the selected operator within the tooltip.
the system shall display operator ID.
The system shall display the Productivity Score value of the selected operator within the tooltip.
the system shall display productivity score.
The system shall dynamically update the leaderboard chart when productivity metrics are recalculated or refreshed.
the system shall update leaderboard chart dynamically.
The system shall display a chart titled “MHE Productivity Leaderboard – Top 5.”
the system shall display “MHE Productivity Leaderboard – Top 5”.
The system shall display a subtitle “Highlighting Utilization Status” below the chart title.
the system shall display “Highlighting Utilization Status”.
The system shall display a horizontal bar chart visualization representing productivity scores of MHE equipment.
the system shall display horizontal bar chart.
The system shall display the top five MHE units ranked based on productivity score.
the system shall show top five MHE units.
The system shall display MHE identifiers (e.g., MHE-005, MHE-006, MHE-001, Order-Picker) along the Y-axis
the system shall display MHE identifiers.
The system shall display Productivity Score values along the X-axis.
the system shall display productivity score values.
The system shall label the X-axis as “Productivity Score.”
the system shall label X-axis as “Productivity Score”.
The system shall scale the Productivity Score axis from 0 to 100 or the maximum available score range.
the system shall scale from 0 to 100 or max range.
The system shall display a refresh icon within the chart panel.
the system shall display refresh icon.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the MHE productivity leaderboard data by clicking the refresh icon.
the system shall reload MHE leaderboard data.
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over or selects a bar representing an MHE unit.
The system shall display the MHE identifier within the tooltip.
the system shall display MHE identifier.
The system shall display the MHE ID associated with the selected equipment within the tooltip.
see MHE ID in the tooltip
the user hovers over an MHE bar
the system shall display the MHE ID.

44.title: View MHE Productivity Score in Tooltip

content.text: The system shall display the Productivity Score value of the selected MHE unit within the tooltip.
the user hovers over an MHE bar
the system shall display productivity score.
The system shall dynamically update the leaderboard chart when productivity metrics are recalculated or refreshed.
productivity metrics are recalculated or refreshed
the system shall update the leaderboard chart dynamically.
The system shall display a chart titled “Operator Productivity vs Idle Time.”
the system shall display “Operator Productivity vs Idle Time”.
The system shall display a subtitle “Wasted Time Analysis” below the chart title.
the system shall display “Wasted Time Analysis”.
The system shall display a scatter plot chart visualizing operator productivity against idle time.
I can analyze productivity vs idle time
the system shall display a scatter plot.
The system shall plot individual operator data points on the chart based on productivity and idle time metrics.
the system shall plot data points based on productivity and idle time.
The system shall display Idle Time (minutes) along the X-axis.
the system shall display Idle Time (minutes).
The system shall label the X-axis as “Idle Time (Minutes).”
the system shall label it as “Idle Time (Minutes)”.
The system shall display Productivity (Pallets/hr) along the Y-axis.
The system shall label the Y-axis as “Productivity (Pallets/hr).”
the system shall label it as “Productivity (Pallets/hr)”.
The system shall display operator data points represented by circular markers on the chart.
the system shall represent points using circular markers.
The system shall display reference threshold lines dividing the chart into productivity and idle time segments.
the system shall display threshold lines dividing segments.
The system shall display interactive markers that respond when hovered or selected by the user.
the user hovers or selects markers
the system shall highlight or respond interactively.
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over or selects a plotted operator data point.
the user hovers over a data point
the system shall display a tooltip.
The system shall display the Operator name within the tooltip.
the system shall display operator name.
The system shall display the Operator ID associated with the selected operator within the tooltip.
the system shall display operator ID.
The system shall display the Idle Time value for the selected operator within the tooltip.
the system shall display idle time value.
The system shall display the Productivity value in pallets per hour for the selected operator within the tooltip.
The system shall display a refresh icon within the chart panel.
the system shall display refresh icon.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the chart data by clicking the refresh icon.
the system shall reload chart data.
The system shall dynamically update the scatter plot visualization when productivity or idle time data changes.
the system shall update scatter plot visualization.
The system shall display a section titled “MHE Utilization Across Sessions.”
the system shall display “MHE Utilization Across Sessions”.
The system shall display a subtitle “Usage Pattern Analysis (Sessions)” below the section title.
the system shall display “Usage Pattern Analysis (Sessions)”.
The system shall display a refresh icon within the MHE Utilization Across Sessions panel.
see a refresh icon in the MHE Utilization panel
the MHE Utilization Across Sessions panel is displayed
the system shall display a refresh icon
The system shall allow the user to refresh the session utilization data by clicking the refresh icon.
the user clicks the refresh icon
the system shall reload session utilization data.
The system shall display individual cards representing each MHE unit’s utilization distribution across sessions.
see utilization cards for each MHE
the system shall display individual cards for each MHE unit.
The system shall display the MHE identifier or equipment name within each utilization card.
the system shall display MHE identifier or equipment name.
The system shall display an equipment icon representing the MHE unit next to the MHE identifier.
the system shall display an equipment icon next to the identifier.
The system shall display the Morning Session, Afternoon session and Night session utilization percentage for each MHE unit.
the system shall display Morning, Afternoon, and Night session utilization.
The system shall display the utilization values as percentage (%) values for each session type.
the system shall display values in percentage (%).
The system shall calculate session utilization percentages based on equipment operational activity recorded during each session period.
the system shall calculate utilization per session.
The system shall display an “Optimal Session” indicator identifying the session with the highest utilization percentage for the MHE unit.
the system shall identify highest utilization session.
The system shall visually highlight the Optimal Session label within each MHE utilization card.
the system shall visually highlight the optimal session label.
The system shall dynamically update session utilization values when session data or analytics calculations are refreshed.
the system shall update utilization values.
The system shall allow vertical scrolling within the panel when the number of MHE utilization cards exceeds the visible area.
number of cards exceeds visible area
the system shall support vertical scrolling.
The system shall maintain consistent styling and alignment of session labels and percentage values across all MHE utilization cards.
the system shall maintain consistent styling and alignment.
The system shall display a section titled “Operator ↔ MHE Pairing Productivity Matrix.”
the system shall display “Operator ↔ MHE Pairing Productivity Matrix”.
The system shall display a subtitle “Optimal Combinations Analysis” below the section title.
the system shall display “Optimal Combinations Analysis”.
The system shall display a refresh icon within the Operator ↔ MHE Pairing Productivity Matrix panel.
the system shall display a refresh icon.
The system shall allow the user to refresh the matrix data by clicking the refresh icon.
the system shall reload matrix data.
The system shall display a matrix visualization representing productivity scores for operator and MHE pair combinations.
the system shall display productivity matrix.
The system shall display MHE identifiers along the vertical axis (Y-axis) of the matrix.
the system shall display MHE identifiers.
The system shall display operator names along the horizontal axis (X-axis) of the matrix.
the system shall display operator names.
The system shall display grid cells representing productivity scores for each operator–MHE combination.
see matrix cells for operator–MHE combinations
the system shall display cells representing each operator–MHE combination.
The system shall populate each matrix cell with the productivity score calculated for the corresponding operator–MHE pairing.
see productivity score in each cell
the system shall populate each cell with productivity score.
The system shall display default value “0” in cells where no productivity data exists for the operator–MHE combination.
see default value when no data exists
no productivity data exists for a pairing
the system shall show value “0” in the cell.
The system shall visually highlight cells containing productivity scores using colour intensity.
I can easily identify performance levels
the system shall highlight cells using color intensity.
The system shall display darker colour shades for higher productivity scores compared to lighter shades for lower values.
the system shall use darker shades for higher values and lighter for lower.
The system shall display interactive cells that respond when the user hovers over them.
the user hovers over a cell
The system shall display a tooltip when the user hovers over a matrix cell containing productivity data.
the system shall display a tooltip.
The system shall display the Operator name within the tooltip.
the user hovers over a cell
the system shall display operator name.
The system shall display the MHE identifier associated with the selected cell within the tooltip.
the system shall display MHE identifier.
The system shall display the productivity score value for the selected operator–MHE combination within the tooltip.
the system shall display productivity score.
The system shall visually highlight the selected matrix cell when hovered or selected by the user.
I know which cell I am interacting with
the user hovers or selects a cell
the system shall highlight the selected cell.
The system shall maintain colour consistency between the highlighted matrix cell and the indicator displayed within the tooltip.
a cell is highlighted and tooltip is shown
the system shall maintain consistent color between cell and tooltip indicator.
The system shall dynamically update the matrix values when productivity calculations or analytics data are refreshed.
the system shall update matrix values dynamically.
